domain: Pufferfish self-inflation defense — threat detection triggers rapid water intake; stomach folds expand 50-100x; total volume +3x in <15s; high physiological cost.
specific_mechanism: Threat-detector → high-cost capacity inflation; defensive layers (spines) become accessible only in inflated state.
llm_application: PUFFER-CAPACITY: threat-detector-triggered rapid inference-capacity inflation (3x compute) loading additional reasoning LoRA + self-reflection chain + safety-judge cascade only on detected adversarial input. Idle = baseline cost. Threat = inflated. Cost capped by session inflation budget.
novelty_claim: Progressive Self-Reflection (EMNLP 2025) is always-on. Standard guardrails are always-on. Reasoning-mode routing is task-class triggered. PUFFER-CAPACITY differs by THREAT-DETECTOR-TRIGGERED rapid compute inflation (3x) only on detected adversarial input + explicit session inflation budget.
